descriptions: Harakat Sham al-Islam is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Harakat Sham al-Islam

'Ndrina Pesce.description: The 'Ndrina Pesce is one of the most powerful 'ndrine of the 'Ndrangheta, based in Rosarno, Calabria. It has an army of affiliates organized in 30 'locali' and numerous 'ndrine, with interests extending from Reggio Calabria to Milan. The clan is involved in all trafficking in the Gioia Tauro area, including drugs, extortion, and control of agricultural markets. It has alliances with other major 'ndrine such as Piromalli, Mancuso, and Molè, and is active internationally with connections in Austria, Greece, Lebanon, Germany, and France.

descriptions: Pesce 'ndrina is a constituent family of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: the Pesce 'ndrina, from Rosarno, named after Giuseppe Pesce, among others.

descriptions: Pesce, along with Mancuso, Piromalli, and Bellocco, mediated peace for the Albanese in the Laureana di Borrello feud.
edges.evidence_quote: si risolve con una pace voluta dai Mancuso - Pesce - Piromalli e Bellocco

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino were involved together in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro, i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino

descriptions: The Bellocco collaborate with the Pesce 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: collabora insieme alla 'ndrina dei Pesce

descriptions: Bellocco, Mancuso, and Pesce are all referenced as sources for drug supply through the port.
edges.evidence_quote: Il pentito Antonino Belnome afferma che per quanto riguarda l'approvvigionamento della droga attraverso il porto di Gioia Tauro , bisognasse fare riferimento ai Mancuso , ai Pesce o ai Bellocco.

descriptions: Bellocco and Pesce jointly controlled port contracts and are allied.
edges.evidence_quote: Jointly with the Pesce clan and in collaboration with the Piromalli-Molè 'ndrina they controlled the public contracts

descriptions: Cataldo 'ndrina was part of a joint venture with several other 'ndrine for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the Barbaro 'ndrina (Platì), Ierinò 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica), Morabito 'ndrina (Africo), Mazzaferro 'ndrina (Gioiosa Ionica) and Pesce 'ndrina (Rosarno).

descriptions: Gallico was allied with Pesce in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: In quel periodo sono alleati con ... i Pesce di Rosarno

descriptions: Carichi di droga degli Ierinò erano destinati alla cosca Pesce.
edges.evidence_quote: 4 carichi sequestrati che erano destinati alla cosca Pesce di Rosarno

descriptions: The Mancuso are allied with the Pesce.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie all'alleanza con i ... Pesce di Rosarno

descriptions: The Mancuso formed a federative pact with the Pesce.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie ai loro collegamenti con le famiglie dei Piromalli e dei Pesce , con le quali stipulano un patto federativo

descriptions: The Mancuso and Pesce were jointly involved in international drug trafficking targeted by operation Decollo.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione di polizia "Decollo" contro il traffico internazionale di sostanze stupefacenti, coinvolte le famiglie dei Mancuso di Limbadi e dei Pesce di Rosarno

descriptions: Mancuso is allied with Pesce.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie all'alleanza con i ... Pesce di Rosarno

descriptions: Mancuso 'ndrina has an alliance with Pesce 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: alliance with the ... Pesce of Rosarno

descriptions: The Mazzaferro represented the Pesce in cocaine deals.
edges.evidence_quote: Oreste Pagano, collaboratore di giustizia racconta che il 30% della cocaina importata dalla Colombia dai Caruana era destinata ai Mazzaferro, essi rappresentavano anche i Barbaro , gli Ierinò , i Morabito , i Cataldo , i Pesce .

descriptions: The Molè and Pesce families were involved together in a counterfeit goods trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 22 dicembre 2009 i carabinieri di Reggio Calabria arrestano 26 persone per un traffico di merci contraffatte ad opera delle famiglie Pesce e Molè

descriptions: Pesce is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta organization.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina dei Pesce è tra le più potenti cosche della 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Pesce 'ndrina is a constituent clan of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pesce 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Pesce, Alvaro, and Coluccio-Aquino were involved together in international drug trafficking with FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane .

descriptions: Pesce, Alvaro, Piromalli, and Molè were targeted together for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 agosto 2016 si conclude l'operazione "Vulcano" nei confronti di 12 presunti esponenti delle famiglie Piromalli , Molè , Alvaro e Pesce accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: Di Marte was accused of drug trafficking for both Pesce and Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 16 aprile 2018 le forze dell'ordine arrestano ... Vincenzo Di Marte, latitante da giugno 2015 accusato di traffico di stupefacenti per i Pesce e gli Alvaro

descriptions: A feud began between Bellocco and Pesce over control of the Rosarno local.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 24 novembre 2012 si viene a conoscenza di un principio di faida tra i Bellocco e i Pesce per il predominio sulla locale di Rosarno .

descriptions: Operation Sant'Anna targeted both Bellocco and Pesce, indicating ongoing conflict or cooperation? Actually, the operation targeted both, but the text does not specify the relationship; however, given the previous feud, it may be conflict. But the quote only states they were targeted together, not a relationship between them. So no edge from this quote alone. However, the earlier feud edge already exists.
edges.evidence_quote: 7 agosto 2014: operazione "Sant'Anna" contro i Bellocco e i Pesce.

descriptions: Pesce and Bellocco together form the local 'ndrangheta chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme alla cosca dei Bellocco costituiscono la " locale " di 'ndrangheta cittadino.

descriptions: Pesce and Bellocco together have international criminal connections.
edges.evidence_quote: All'estero, insieme ai Bellocco hanno collegamenti con la criminalità, austriaca , greca , libanese , tedesca e francese .

descriptions: Pesce and Bellocco members were arrested together in 2006 for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 gennaio 2006 vengono arrestate 54 persone affiliate ai Pesce e ai Bellocco

descriptions: A member of both Pesce and Bellocco was involved in illegal betting operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 novembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione "Galassia" ... in cui il presunto membro dei Pesce- Bellocco Antonio Zungri

descriptions: Pesce, Bellocco, Piromalli, Molè, and Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì were targeted together in operation Crypto.
edges.evidence_quote: 14 settembre 2021: operazione "Crypto" contro i Piromalli , i Molè , i Bellocco , i Pesce e i Cacciola-Certo-Pronestì.

descriptions: Pesce and Bellocco clans jointly controlled port contracts and activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Jointly with the Bellocco clan and in collaboration with the Piromalli-Molè 'ndrina they controlled the public contracts for the construction of the container terminal in the port of Gioia Tauro.

descriptions: Pesce and Bellocco are often referred to together as a single entity, indicating close alliance or merger.
edges.evidence_quote: la cosca Pesce/ Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Pesce was involved in international drug trafficking with Ierinò, Commisso, Coluccio, and Aquino.
edges.evidence_quote: per la 'ndrangheta c'erano presunti affiliati agli Ierinò , Commisso , Coluccio , Aquino e Pesce.

descriptions: Pesce formed an alliance with Mancuso, Piromalli, and Molè for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno sancito un'alleanza per il controllo del territorio della piana di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Piromalli , i Mancuso e ai Molè .

descriptions: Mancuso 'ndrina is listed as an ally of Pesce 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Piromalli , Bellocco and Mancuso 'ndrine

descriptions: Pesce formed an alliance with Molè, Piromalli, and Mancuso for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno sancito un'alleanza per il controllo del territorio della piana di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Piromalli , i Mancuso e ai Molè .

descriptions: Pesce and Molè were arrested for trafficking counterfeit goods.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 22 dicembre 2009 i carabinieri di Reggio Calabria arrestano 26 persone per un traffico di merci contraffatte ad opera delle famiglie Pesce e Molè

descriptions: Pesce, Molè, Piromalli, and Alvaro were targeted together for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 agosto 2016 si conclude l'operazione "Vulcano" nei confronti di 12 presunti esponenti delle famiglie Piromalli , Molè , Alvaro e Pesce accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: The Pesce and Pantano are grouped together as a single cosca in the operation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Eclissi... contro appartenenti alle cosche di 'ndrangheta "Bellocco-Cimato" e "Pesce-Pantano"

descriptions: Pesce formed an alliance with Piromalli, Mancuso, and Molè for territorial control.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno sancito un'alleanza per il controllo del territorio della piana di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Piromalli , i Mancuso e ai Molè .

descriptions: Pesce, Piromalli, Molè, and Alvaro were targeted together for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 agosto 2016 si conclude l'operazione "Vulcano" nei confronti di 12 presunti esponenti delle famiglie Piromalli , Molè , Alvaro e Pesce accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: Pesce and Piromalli were both investigated for the Scopelliti murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 21 marzo 2019 il procuratore Giuseppe Lombardo riapre l'inchiesta sull'omicidio di Antonino Scopelliti e risultano tra gli indagati Antonino Pesce (1953) insieme a ... Giuseppe Piromalli

descriptions: Pesce collaborated with Piromalli-Molè on port contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: Jointly with the Bellocco clan and in collaboration with the Piromalli-Molè 'ndrina they controlled the public contracts for the construction of the container terminal in the port of Gioia Tauro.

descriptions: Sabatino is a satellite clan of Pesce.
edges.evidence_quote: I Sabatino sono una loro cosca satellite.

descriptions: Pesce was involved in international drug trafficking with Coluccio, Ierinò, Commisso, and Aquino.
edges.evidence_quote: per la 'ndrangheta c'erano presunti affiliati agli Ierinò , Commisso , Coluccio , Aquino e Pesce.

descriptions: Pesce was involved in international drug trafficking with Aquino, Ierinò, Commisso, and Coluccio.
edges.evidence_quote: per la 'ndrangheta c'erano presunti affiliati agli Ierinò , Commisso , Coluccio , Aquino e Pesce.

descriptions: The Pesce are one of the families that head the Basilischi organization.
edges.evidence_quote: "Faccia D'Angelo" si rivolgerà alla famiglia Pesce di Rosarno e alla famiglia Serraino di Cardeto per avere il loro appoggio e il permesso. Sia i Serraino che i Pesce acconsentirono, così da essere ancora oggi le famiglie a capo dell'organizzazione dei Basilischi .

descriptions: Ierinò, Commisso, Coluccio, Aquino, and Pesce managed drug trafficking together with Cartel del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: Il traffico veniva gestito insieme al Cartello del Golfo e ai cartelli colombiani , per la 'Ndrangheta c'erano presunti affiliati agli Ierinò , Commisso , Coluccio, Aquino e Pesce

descriptions: Pesce managed drug trafficking together with the Gulf Cartel and Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: Il traffico veniva gestito insieme al Cartello del Golfo e ai cartelli colombiani

descriptions: Alvaro, Pesce, and Coluccio-Aquino trafficked drugs together with a FARC commander.
edges.evidence_quote: blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane

descriptions: Pesce cooperated with FARC in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 17 giugno 2015 si conclude un'operazione ... che blocca un traffico internazionale di droga tra gli Alvaro , i Pesce e i Coluccio-Aquino insieme ad un comandante delle FARC colombiane .

descriptions: Piromalli made a pact with Pesce and others in the 1970s to manage wealth and avoid war.
edges.evidence_quote: I Piromalli fecero un patto con le 'ndrine dei Pesce, Mancuso, De Stefano, Mammoliti e Avignone, per gestire le enormi ricchezze che sarebbero arrivate e per evitare una futura guerra.

descriptions: Piromalli and Pesce were jointly accused of international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 agosto 2016 si conclude l'operazione Vulcano nei confronti di 12 presunti esponenti delle famiglie Piromalli, Molè, Alvaro e Pesce accusati di traffico internazionale di droga

descriptions: Pesce and Piromalli cooperate in transporting cocaine from Gioia Tauro port.
edges.evidence_quote: the cocaine arriving at the port is transported further by the Pesce and Piromalli clans

descriptions: The Serraino and Pesce jointly gave permission and became heads of the Basilischi organization.
edges.evidence_quote: "Faccia D'Angelo" si rivolgerà alla famiglia Pesce di Rosarno e alla famiglia Serraino di Cardeto per avere il loro appoggio e il permesso. Sia i Serraino che i Pesce acconsentirono, così da essere ancora oggi le famiglie a capo dell'organizzazione dei Basilischi .

descriptions: Pesce supported the Albanese-Cutellè-Tassone group.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mancuso , i Piromalli e i Pesce appoggiavano il primo gruppo

descriptions: Aquino have agreements with Pesce for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: Pesce - Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Basilischi obtained approval from the Pesce clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Ottenuto difatti il nulla osta dalle 'ndrine dei Pesce di Rosarno

descriptions: D'Alessandro worked with Pesce 'ndrina for drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: i D'Alessandro erano in attività con le 'ndrine Bellocco e Pesce del comune di Rosarno

descriptions: The D'Alessandro clan had contacts with the Pesce 'ndrina for drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: The D'Alessandro clan also used a network of brokers by which they accessed new supply channels, having contacts even with the Bellocco and Pesce 'ndrine, historical 'Ndrangheta groups from Rosarno in Calabria.

descriptions: The Casalesi have excellent relations with the Pesce/Bellocco clan.
edges.evidence_quote: ottimi rapporti intercorrerebbero tra i Casalesi e la cosca Pesce/ Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: 031 Bloods listed as an ally of PDC in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: PIF (Paid In Full), CFR (Corleone Family Riderz), OC (Organised Crime) Nasty Squad, 031 (0-Tray 1 Bloods)

descriptions: 031 Bloods formed by Tanna, a former PDC member.
edges.evidence_quote: Tanna, who came up with the name 'PDC', went and formed the 031 Bloods.

descriptions: Westmob has been in conflict with Big Block since 1999.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1999, they have been in conflict with the Big Block gang, which is its major rival in the area.

descriptions: Kadyrovites were formed from pardoned former militants of the Chechen Republic of Ichkeria.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2015 BBC reported that a considerable part of Kadyrovites were Chechen Republic of Ichkeria militants pardoned by Russian president Vladimir Putin under the word of Ramzan Kadyrov

descriptions: Pit Bull Crew was a rival off-shoot of Doddington that aligned with Gooch.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pit Bull Crew paradoxically aligned itself with the Gooch gang, deepening the violent divisions not only between Doddington and Gooch but within Doddington's ranks itself.

descriptions: Pit Bull Crew initially fought Gooch but later allied with them.
edges.evidence_quote: The PBC waged war on the Longsight Crew and the Doddington... but quickly established a truce and alliance with the Gooch.

descriptions: Infoboox lists Pit Bull Crew as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Pit Bull Crew

descriptions: Pit Bull Crew is a faction affiliated with Gooch.
edges.evidence_quote: Gooch affiliated Pit Bull Crew faction

descriptions: Pit Bull Crew was in conflict with Doddington Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The PBC waged war on the Longsight Crew and the Doddington

descriptions: Pit Bull Crew aligned with Gooch gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pit Bull Crew paradoxically aligned itself with the Gooch gang

descriptions: Pit Bull Crew was in conflict with Longsight Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: The PBC waged war on the Longsight Crew and the Doddington

descriptions: Los Cabrera Sarabia are listed as enemies of La Línea in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Cabrera Sarabia

descriptions: The Nashes and Foreman cooperated in a protection racket federation.
edges.evidence_quote: After the Richardsons were jailed in 1967, the Krays, the Nashes, Foreman and Pyle came to an informal agreement after a series of meetings about splitting the proceeds from their various protection rackets

descriptions: The Krays and Foreman cooperated in a protection racket federation.
edges.evidence_quote: After the Richardsons were jailed in 1967, the Krays, the Nashes, Foreman and Pyle came to an informal agreement after a series of meetings about splitting the proceeds from their various protection rackets

edges.target: Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam
descriptions: Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam is listed as a non-state ally of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed, Pakistani Taliban, Hizbul Mujahideen, Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen, Al-Badr, Al Rashid Trust, Indian Mujahideen, People’s Anti-Fascist Front, Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam, Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

descriptions: Noffel clan allied with Martha organisation to assassinate Samir Bouyakhrichan.
edges.evidence_quote: Naoufal allied himself with the Taghi organisation, the Irish Mob and some members of the Martha organisation, to assassinate the billionaire drug lord Samir Bouyakhrichan in 2014.

Clan Di Biasi.description: The Di Biasi clan, also known as 'i Faiano', was a Camorra organization operating in the Quartieri Spagnoli area of Naples, Italy. It emerged in the 1980s as a longa manus of the Giuliano clan. The clan was involved in drug trafficking and had a violent rivalry with the Russo clan, leading to multiple murders. In July 2008, a major police operation led to the arrest of several members, and the clan is now considered defunct.

descriptions: The Di Biasi acted as the longa manus (extended arm) of the Giuliano clan in the Quartieri Spagnoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '80 i Di Biasi erano la longa manus dei Giuliano nei Quartieri Spagnoli.

descriptions: The Russo clan threatened the Di Biasi's dominance in the neighborhood.
edges.evidence_quote: Ma il loro predominio nel quartiere è stato sempre in bilico e minacciato dal clan Russo.

descriptions: The Di Biasi had friendships with bosses of the Alleanza di Secondigliano, but these did not provide sufficient protection.
edges.evidence_quote: mal protetto dalle sue amicizie con i boss dell' Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: Giuliano clan ceded territory to Di Biasi brothers, leading to formation of Di Biasi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Luigi Giuliano relinquished control of the Quartieri Spagnoli to the Di Biasi brothers, who then founded the Di Biasi clan

descriptions: Clan Russo fought a war against Clan Faiano, resulting in deaths on both sides.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan è stato protagonista di una guerra che li ha visti misurarsi con il clan "Faiano" e che ha provocato vittime eccellenti da entrambe le parti.

descriptions: Montreal chapter shipped cocaine to London chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: The British Hells Angels have a close association with the Canadian Hells Angels, and the Angels' Montreal chapter was involved in shipping cocaine to the Angels' London chapter.

descriptions: OTB is listed as an ally of Peckham Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: CWS, T-Block , ABM (All Bout Money), Firehouse Crew, OTB, Wooly Road Youngers

descriptions: Driftwood Crips is listed as an ally of Brothers Keepers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Clan del Golfo Independent Soldiers , Hells Angels , Driftwood Crips

descriptions: Driftwood Crips run drug lines for Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers also have a close relationship with the Driftwood Crips

descriptions: FUNSK opposed the Khmer Rouge during the Cambodian-Vietnamese War.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Cambodian–Vietnamese War: FUNSK (1978–1979)

'Ndrina Barreca.description: The 'Ndrina Barreca is a 'ndrina (criminal family) of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, based in the southern area of Reggio Calabria, active since the 1980s. It operates in the neighborhoods of Pellaro, Bocale, and Lazzaro. Originally part of the Ambrogio clan, it split off during the Pellaro feud in the late 1980s. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and violent feuds, and several members have become pentiti (collaborators with justice).

descriptions: Barreca is a sub-unit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Barreca 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Barreca had a close personal and ritual alliance with Araniti.
edges.evidence_quote: Barreca had his son baptized by the capobastone of the Araniti 'ndrina, Santo Araniti. In 1979, Barreca received the "santista" rank from Araniti himself.

descriptions: The Barreca were in conflict with the Chila during the faida di Pellaro.
edges.evidence_quote: faida di Pellaro scoppiata durante il periodo '86-'89 tra Ambrogio-Iamonte-Barreca-Chila

descriptions: The Barreca were opposed to the Condello in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Barreca sought to reestablish an alliance with Condello after earlier conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Peppì Barreca's strategic objective included reestablishing alliances with the influential 'ndrine from Reggio Calabria, such as the De Stefano-Tegano, Condello, and Libri families.

descriptions: The Barreca allied with the De Stefano in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: The Barreca allied with the Tegano in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Barreca allied with De Stefano-Tegano in the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Barreca 'ndrina sided with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri and Latella 'ndrine against Pasquale Condello, Diego Rosmini and Antonio Imerti.

descriptions: The Barreca were opposed to the Fontana in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: The Franco clan is an ally of the Barreca.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 7 novembre 2013 viene arrestato per traffico di droga ad Antibes in Costa Azzurra Giovanni Franco esponente di spicco dell'omonima famiglia e alleato al clan Barreca

descriptions: The Barreca were in conflict with the Iamonte during the faida di Pellaro.
edges.evidence_quote: faida di Pellaro scoppiata durante il periodo '86-'89 tra Ambrogio-Iamonte-Barreca-Chila

descriptions: The Barreca were opposed to the Imerti in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: The Barreca allied with the Libri in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Barreca allied with Libri in the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Barreca 'ndrina sided with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri and Latella 'ndrine against Pasquale Condello, Diego Rosmini and Antonio Imerti.

descriptions: The Barreca were opposed to the Lo Giudice in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: The Barreca and Malacrinò split after internal disputes.
edges.evidence_quote: i rapporti tra Barreca e il cognato Malacrinò si incrinarono al punto da definire una vera scissione tra le due famiglie

descriptions: The Barreca allied with the Paviglianiti in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: The Barreca were opposed to the Serraino in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: The Barreca allied with the Zito-Bertuca in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: The Barreca originally belonged to the Ambrogio but split off during the faida di Pellaro.
edges.evidence_quote: In origine faceva parte degli Ambrogio di Pellaro , da cui se ne distacca con la faida di Pellaro scoppiata durante il periodo '86-'89 tra Ambrogio-Iamonte-Barreca-Chila in cui muore il boss Carmelo Ambrogio .

descriptions: Barreca split from Ambrogio 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: The Barreca 'ndrina emerged as an offshoot of the now-defunct Ambrogio 'ndrina

descriptions: A member of the Ficara killed Vincenzo Barreca, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: sarà condannato all'ergastolo il killer Vincenzo Ficara della 'ndrina Ficara-Latella

descriptions: The Barreca allied with the Latella in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Barreca allied with Latella in the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Barreca 'ndrina sided with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri and Latella 'ndrine against Pasquale Condello, Diego Rosmini and Antonio Imerti.

descriptions: The Barreca clan allied with the De Stefano during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: per i De Stefano capeggiati ora da Orazio , fratello di Paolo ci sono i Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Barreca , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Franco-Spanti is allied with the Cosca Barreca.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata con la cosca Barreca , storico clan di Pellaro

descriptions: Ambrogio and Barreca were in conflict in the Pellaro feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Pellaro: faida combattuta tra gli anni '80/'90, tra il clan Ambrogio contro i Barreca

descriptions: The Caligiuri have a family feud against the Santoro.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni settanta scoppia la faida famigliare contro i Santoro di Cirò Marina

descriptions: The PKK lists the Sinjar Resistance Units as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Sinjar Resistance Units

Clan Misso.description: Camorra clan operating in the Rione Sanità district of Naples, Italy. Founded in the 1980s by Giuseppe Misso, known as 'o nasone. Specialized in bank robberies, postal office heists, and armored truck thefts, as well as usury, counterfeiting, and gold trafficking. Engaged in violent feuds with rival clans, including a split led by Salvatore Torino in 2005.

descriptions: The Giuliano and Misso clans fought a faida from 1979 to 1984.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Giuliano e i Misso : combattuta tra il 1979 e il 1984

descriptions: The Giuliano clan fought wars against the Misso clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Le numerose guerre tra gli anni ottanta e novanta contro i Contini , i Licciardi , i Lo Russo , i Misso e i Mazzarella depotenziano però notevolmente il clan Giuliano

descriptions: Mazzarella clan allied with Misso and Sarno clans in the Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: In the late 1980s the Mazzarellas formed a strong alliance with the Misso and Sarno clans, called Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno, to oppose to the rising power of the Secondigliano Alliance

descriptions: Mazzarella absorbed Misso into a cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel corso degli anni la famiglia di Vincenzo Mazzarella ha inglobato altri clan come i Misso e i Sarno formando così uno dei cartelli più influenti dell'epoca: i Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: The alliance dissolved and led to a feud between Misso and Giuliano.
edges.evidence_quote: amico fin dall'inizio della sua carriera criminale di Luigi Giuliano, legame che poi si sarebbe sciolto e avrebbe determinato una faida

descriptions: Initially allied with Luigi Giuliano's clan, but later the relationship turned into a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: amico fin dall'inizio della sua carriera criminale di Luigi Giuliano, legame che poi si sarebbe sciolto e avrebbe determinato una faida

descriptions: Misso gathered the bosses of Mazzarella and Sarno clans around his group for a revenge project.
edges.evidence_quote: Misso avrebbe raccolto intorno al proprio gruppo i capiclan dei Mazzarella e dei Sarno

descriptions: Misso gathered the bosses of Mazzarella and Sarno clans around his group for a revenge project.
edges.evidence_quote: Misso avrebbe raccolto intorno al proprio gruppo i capiclan dei Mazzarella e dei Sarno

descriptions: A split from Misso clan was led by Salvatore Torino, who was linked to the Lo Russo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: un uomo legato al clan Lo Russo : Salvatore Torino detto ' 'o gassusaro '

descriptions: Misso, Pirozzi, and Savarese families founded a criminal association together.
edges.evidence_quote: La nascita del sodalizio criminale tra le tre famiglie Misso, Pirozzi e Savarese sarebbe da datare intorno agli anni '80

descriptions: Misso, Pirozzi, and Savarese families founded a criminal association together.
edges.evidence_quote: La nascita del sodalizio criminale tra le tre famiglie Misso, Pirozzi e Savarese sarebbe da datare intorno agli anni '80

descriptions: Misso fought against scissionists close to the Secondigliano clans.
edges.evidence_quote: un conflitto tra il clan Misso del Rione Sanità e alcuni scissionisti guidati da Salvatore Torino, vicino ai clan di Secondigliano

descriptions: The Misso clan and the Alleanza di Secondigliano were in a faida that escalated after 1992.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Misso e l'Alleanza di Secondigliano : faida portata avanti dal boss Giuseppe Misso e dai vertici dell' Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: The Misso clan fought against the allied Tolomelli and Vastarella clans in 1997-1998.
edges.evidence_quote: prima faida della Sanità : fu combattuta negli anni 1997 e 1998 tra il clan Misso e i clan, alleati tra loro, Tolomelli e Vastarella

descriptions: Tolomelli and Vastarella families were forced to leave the neighborhood due to conflict with Misso clan.
edges.evidence_quote: con il passare degli anni i boss Tolomelli e Vastarella sono stati costretti ad abbandonare il quartiere con le loro famiglie

descriptions: The Misso and Torino clans were in conflict in the Sanità area.
edges.evidence_quote: seconda faida della Sanità : combattuta dal 2005 al 2007 tra il clan Misso e la fazione scissionista dei Torino, appoggiati dai Lo Russo di Miano.

descriptions: The Misso clan fought against the allied Tolomelli and Vastarella clans in 1997-1998.
edges.evidence_quote: prima faida della Sanità : fu combattuta negli anni 1997 e 1998 tra il clan Misso e i clan, alleati tra loro, Tolomelli e Vastarella

descriptions: Tolomelli and Vastarella families were forced to leave the neighborhood due to conflict with Misso clan.
edges.evidence_quote: con il passare degli anni i boss Tolomelli e Vastarella sono stati costretti ad abbandonare il quartiere con le loro famiglie

descriptions: Clan Russo is allied with Clan Misso through marriage and alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: L'ultimo dei figli di Mimì, Salvatore, ha sposato la figlia di Ciro Lepre, detto 'o sceriffo, il boss del Cavone, anch'egli alleato di Misso.

descriptions: Clan Sarno allied with Misso and Mazzarella to form a cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: si unì successivamente alle famiglie Mazzarella e Misso formando il cartello criminale cosiddetto: Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: Misso joined the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: Quando nella Nuova Famiglia subentrarono anche i Nuvoletta , gli Alfieri , i Galasso , i Misso della Sanità e soprattutto i Casalesi

Bakassi Boys.description: Nigerian youth vigilante group that operated mainly in southeastern and south-southern Nigeria from 1998 to 2006. They targeted armed robbers, ritual killers, and kidnappers, often using machetes and guns, and were accused of extrajudicial killings. They claimed magical immunity to bullets, known as Odeshi. The group later rebranded as Anambra Vigilante Services.

descriptions: Young Brockley Mandem is an ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brockley Mandem, Tottenham Mandem , Young Brockley Mandem (YBM)

descriptions: Free Fighters MC Erding merged into Trust MC in 1984.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 1984 the MCs MC Ergoldsbach (founded 1982), the Devil Cobra MC Moosburg, the Free Fighters MC Erding, the Ranger MC Neutraubling and some members of the Destroyer MCs Landshut merged to form the Trust MC Germany.

descriptions: Zig Zag Crew was a puppet gang that paid tribute and worked for the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Satsatin's recording also revealed that every member of the Zig Zag Crew had to pay $1, 000 to a particular Hells Angel per month and do most of the Hells Angels work for them in exchange for the possibility of one day being allowed to join the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Zig Zag Crew is a puppet club of Hells Angels Winnipeg chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: Project Divide culminated with 26 arrests... after the year-long investigation. The investigation and arrests targeted alleged drug-trafficking and related activities of the Zig Zag Crew – a puppet club of the Hells Angels Winnipeg chapter.

descriptions: The Zig Zag Crew was a puppet gang serving the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: A puppet gang, The Zig Zag crew, was founded to serve the Hells Angels.

descriptions: The Indian Posse and the Zig Zag Crew engaged in violent incidents in prison.
edges.evidence_quote: In the summer of 2002, there had been a number of violent incidents at Stoney Mountain Penitentiary between the imprisoned members of the Hells Angels' puppet gang, the Zig Zag Crew, and the Indian Posse.

descriptions: The Zig Zag Crew is a puppet gang of the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hells Angels' puppet gang, the Zig Zag Crew

descriptions: Zig Zag Crew sold drugs to Manitoba Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zig Zag Crew in turn sold drugs to other criminal groups in Manitoba, most notably the First Nations gangs such as the Redd Alert, the Manitoba Warriors and the Native Syndicate.

descriptions: Zig Zag Crew sold drugs to Redd Alert.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zig Zag Crew in turn sold drugs to other criminal groups in Manitoba, most notably the First Nations gangs such as the Redd Alert, the Manitoba Warriors and the Native Syndicate.

descriptions: Longo supported Piromalli as old allies.
edges.evidence_quote: i Longo hanno appoggiato i Piromalli, loro vecchi alleati

descriptions: Longo and Versace merged through marriage; Versace took over Longo's operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Violetta Longo, figlia di Luigi, sposò Antonio Versace, che prese il posto del suocero

Penny Mobs.description: The Penny Mobs was a street gang active in Glasgow, Scotland during the early 1870s. The name derived from the practice of collecting a penny per member to pay court fines, avoiding imprisonment. Formed by Irish immigrants fleeing the potato famines, the gang declined after courts stopped offering fines as an alternative to imprisonment.

descriptions: The Billy Boys were formerly known as Penny Mobs.
edges.evidence_quote: two of the most infamous were the former Penny Mobs , the Bridgeton Billy Boys and the Norman Conks

descriptions: The Norman Conks were formerly known as Penny Mobs.
edges.evidence_quote: two of the most infamous were the former Penny Mobs , the Bridgeton Billy Boys and the Norman Conks

descriptions: Somali Outlaws and 1627 Boys are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hot Boyz , Madhiban With Attitude , 1627 Boys

Strisciuglio clan.description: The Strisciuglio clan is a powerful and violent criminal organization based in Bari, Italy, founded in the late 1990s by Domenico Strisciuglio. It operates primarily in the northern area of Bari, engaging in murder, drug trafficking, money laundering, extortion, usury, and gambling. The clan has close ties with local politics and is currently active.

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan is listed as a rival of Capriati clan in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Strisciuglio clan

descriptions: Feuds between Capriati and Strisciuglio for control of the old city.
edges.evidence_quote: faide tra i clan Capriati e Strisciuglio per il controllo della città vecchia

descriptions: The Diomede faction attacked the Strisciuglio clan in the San Valentino massacre.
edges.evidence_quote: La strage fu ordinata da Nicola e Giuseppe Diomede, mandanti del delitto, con l'obiettivo di colpire il clan rivale degli Strisciuglio

descriptions: The Strisciuglio clan is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Strisciuglio clan

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan is listed as a rival of Capriati clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Capriati clan

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan originated as a splinter from Capriati clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The criminal organization was born at the late 1990s as an offshoot of another clan operating in Bari, the Capriati clan.

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan is listed as a rival of Mercante-Diomede clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mercante-Diomede clan

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan is listed as a rival of Misceo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Misceo clan

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan violently overtook the Misceo clan in San Paolo.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan's tentacles have thus enveloped the San Paolo neighbourhood, where they have violently gripped the Misceo clan

descriptions: Strisciuglio clan is listed as a rival of Parisi-Palermiti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Parisi-Palermiti clan

descriptions: Gallico was allied with Dinaro in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: In quel periodo sono alleati con i Dinaro di Melicuccà

descriptions: The two clubs had a close friendship.
edges.evidence_quote: the Canadian and Boston groups maintained a close friendship with one another

'Ndrina Accorinti.description: The Accorinti are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Briatico, Tropea and Zungri, in the province of Vibo Valentia, Italy. Their existence was legally established in August 2020 following the 'Costa pulita' operation of 2016. They have ties with the Giampà 'ndrina of Lamezia Terme and the Mancuso clan. The clan is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and other criminal activities.

descriptions: Accorinti has ties with Giampà 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli accorinti hanno legami con la 'ndrina dei Giampà di Lamezia Terme

descriptions: Accorinti and Grande jointly managed tourist ferries with La Rosa.
edges.evidence_quote: le 'ndrine Accorinti , La Rosa e Grande che gestivano con soldi illegali anche i traghetti turistici per le isole Eolie

descriptions: Accorinti planned retaliation against Mancuso after a murder and injury in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: A partire dal 2003 con l'omicidio di Raffaele Fiammingo, vicino agli Accorinti e il ferimento di Francesco Mancuso, alias Tabacco , gli Accorinti stavano preparando a Roma una ritorsione contro Michele Mancuso

descriptions: Accorinti has ties with Mancuso 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli accorinti hanno legami con ... i Mancuso

descriptions: Soriano wanted to eliminate Accorinti boss Giuseppe Accorinti.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 6 marzo 2018 i carabinieri di Vibo Valentia con l'operazione Nemea arrestano a Filandari presunti elementi dei Soriano da cui emerge il voler eliminare il boss Giuseppe Accorinti

descriptions: Accorinti in relationship with Tripodi for heroin trafficking since the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo il pentito Servello gli Accorinti sarebbero in rapporto con i Tripodi di Vibo Valentia sin dagli anni '90 per spaccio di eroina

descriptions: Accorinti was helped by Damiano Vallelonga in planning retaliation.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Accorinti con l'aiuto del boss di Serra San Bruno Damiano Vallelonga

descriptions: La Rosa, Accorinti, and Grande jointly managed tourist ferries with illegal money.
edges.evidence_quote: le 'ndrine Accorinti , La Rosa e Grande che gestivano con soldi illegali anche i traghetti turistici per le isole Eolie

descriptions: The Mancuso, Accorinti, La Rosa, and Grande were targeted together, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Costa pulita" ... contro i Mancuso e ... le 'ndrine Accorinti , La Rosa e Grande

Wagner Group.description: Russian state-funded private military company controlled by Yevgeny Prigozhin until 2023, then by his son Pavel. Emerged during the war in Donbas (2014-2015), played a major role in the Russian invasion of Ukraine, and supported regimes in Syria, Libya, Central African Republic, and Mali. Accused of war crimes and linked to far-right extremism. Led an armed rebellion against Russia in June 2023.

descriptions: Africa Corps subsumed and rebranded Wagner Group's structures in Africa.
edges.evidence_quote: The corps largely took over the operations of the Wagner Group in Africa, by subsuming and rebranding its structures.

descriptions: An Evil Corp member participated in a hackathon organized by Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: in December 2022, Igor Turashev and his company placed third in a hackathon organized by the Wagner Group

descriptions: Wagner Group allegedly trained Hamas militants.
edges.evidence_quote: the National Resistance Center of Ukraine alleged that the Russian Wagner Group trained Hamas militants ahead of the 7 October attacks.

descriptions: M23 lists Wagner Group as an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Democratic Republic of the Congo, Wagner Group (allegedly), Wazalendo, Burundi, South Africa, Malawi, Tanzania, MONUSCO, FDLR

descriptions: Wagner Group was an ally of RSF until early 2024.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Wagner Group (until early 2024)

descriptions: Wagner Group provided training and equipment to RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Leaked documents and sources reportedly indicate that the Wagner Group has provided training and equipment, including armored vehicles and helicopter gunships, to Hemedti's forces.

descriptions: Wagner Group was merged into the Africa Corps.
edges.evidence_quote: By the following year, the Wagner Group in Africa was merged into the 'Africa Corps'.

descriptions: Infobox lists Al-Nusra Front as an opponent of Wagner Group from 2014 to 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List: Al-Nusra Front (2014–2017)

descriptions: Infobox lists Ansar al-Sunna as an opponent of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List: Ansar al-Sunna

descriptions: Infobox lists Azande Ani Kpi Gbe as an ally of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: List: ... Azande Ani Kpi Gbe

descriptions: Infobox lists Black Russians as an ally of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: List: ... Black Russians

descriptions: Infobox lists Coalition of Patriots for Change as an opponent of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List: Coalition of Patriots for Change

descriptions: Infobox lists CSP-PSD as an opponent of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List: CSP-PSD

descriptions: Prigozhin used the Internet Research Agency as part of his business empire to support Wagner's operations.
edges.evidence_quote: He would use another arm of his business empire, a troll factory called the Internet Research Agency, to smear domestic opposition, popularize the client and further exploit grievances against the West.

descriptions: Infobox lists IRGC as an ally of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: List: ... IRGC

descriptions: Infobox lists Islamic State as an opponent of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List: Islamic State

descriptions: Wagner fought against ISIL in Syria.
edges.evidence_quote: He was also reported to had been involved in the first offensive to capture Palmyra from the Islamic State (ISIL) in early 2016.

descriptions: JNIM ambushed and killed Wagner soldiers in Mali.
edges.evidence_quote: On 21 November, at least seven Wagner soldiers were killed by al-Qaeda affiliate JNIM in an ambush on a convoy in the Mopti region.

descriptions: Former Wagner fighters have joined Akhmat units.
edges.evidence_quote: Other reports indicate that former Wagner fighters have joined Chechen Akhmat units, whilst still wearing Wagner patches.

descriptions: Infobox lists Nusrat al-Islam as an opponent of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List: Nusrat al-Islam

descriptions: Infobox lists Rapid Support Forces as an ally of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: List: ... Rapid Support Forces

descriptions: Rusich is a sub-group of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: A Wagner sub-group, "Rusich", was founded by self-proclaimed neo-Nazi Alexey Milchakov and is open about its far-right ideology.

descriptions: Rusich is a unit within the Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wagner Group includes a contingent known as Rusich, or Task Force Rusich

descriptions: Founding members of Wagner are members of the Russian Imperial Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Some founding members of Wagner belong to the far-right ultranationalist Russian Imperial Movement.

descriptions: A Wagner Serb unit was commanded by a former member of the Serb Volunteer Guard.
edges.evidence_quote: Wagner is believed to have a Serb unit, which was, until at least April 2016, under the command of Davor Savičić, a Bosnian Serb who was a member of the Serb Volunteer Guard (also known as Arkan's Tigers) during the Bosnian War

descriptions: Infobox lists Tahrir al-Sham as an opponent of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List: Tahrir al-Sham

Aston Villa Hardcore.description: Football hooligan firm associated with Aston Villa FC, based in Birmingham, England. Active since circa 1993, following earlier firms the Steamers, C-Crew and Villa Youth. Known for clashes with rival firms such as Birmingham City's Zulu Warriors and Chelsea Headhunters. Members have been involved in multiple violent incidents and received banning orders.

descriptions: Aston Villa Hardcore succeeded the C-Crew as a hooligan firm.
edges.evidence_quote: The firm have been active since circa 1993, following on from previous Aston Villa hooligan firms the Steamers, C-Crew and Villa Youth.

descriptions: Aston Villa Hardcore fought with Chelsea Headhunters in an organized brawl.
edges.evidence_quote: Steven Fowler... was jailed... for his part in an organised brawl between the Villa Hardcore and Chelsea Headhunters at King's Cross in London on 27 March 2004.

descriptions: Aston Villa Hardcore fought with Kop of Boulogne in a street fight.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Hardcore took part in a street fight with PSG's Kop of Boulogne (KoB) hooligan firm outside a bar in the Pigalle district of Paris.

descriptions: Aston Villa Hardcore succeeded the Steamers as a hooligan firm.
edges.evidence_quote: The firm have been active since circa 1993, following on from previous Aston Villa hooligan firms the Steamers, C-Crew and Villa Youth.

descriptions: Aston Villa Hardcore has clashed with Zulu Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hardcore have clashed a number of times with the Zulu Warriors, associated with Aston Villa's fiercest rivals Birmingham City.

Colorado crime family.description: Italian-American Mafia crime family based in Pueblo and Denver, Colorado. Originated as a bootlegging organization under the Carlino brothers in the 1920s, later taken over by Giuseppe Roma and evolved into the Denver branch of La Cosa Nostra. Engaged in extortion, loan sharking, drug trafficking, and other rackets. Believed defunct by the 2000s after the death of Clarence Smaldone.

descriptions: The Denver crime family is listed as an ally of the Chicago Outfit in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Denver crime family

descriptions: The Colorado crime family is the Denver branch of La Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Roma's organization evolved into the Denver branch of La Cosa Nostra, which became known as the Smaldone crime family.

descriptions: The Bonanno crime family is listed as an ally of the Colorado crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Chicago Outfit, Kansas City crime family, Los Angeles crime family, New Orleans crime family, St. Louis crime family

descriptions: The Colorado crime family originated from the Carlino brothers' bootlegging organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The family originated as a bootlegging organization headed by the brothers Pete and Sam Carlino

descriptions: The Chicago Outfit is listed as an ally of the Colorado crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Chicago Outfit, Kansas City crime family, Los Angeles crime family, New Orleans crime family, St. Louis crime family

descriptions: The Kansas City crime family is listed as an ally of the Colorado crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Chicago Outfit, Kansas City crime family, Los Angeles crime family, New Orleans crime family, St. Louis crime family

descriptions: The Los Angeles crime family is listed as an ally of the Colorado crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Chicago Outfit, Kansas City crime family, Los Angeles crime family, New Orleans crime family, St. Louis crime family

descriptions: The New Orleans crime family is listed as an ally of the Colorado crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Chicago Outfit, Kansas City crime family, Los Angeles crime family, New Orleans crime family, St. Louis crime family

descriptions: The Colorado family partnered with the St. Louis crime family in skimming casino profits.
edges.evidence_quote: Beginning in 1973 or earlier, the Colorado family partnered with the St. Louis crime family in skimming profits from the Riviera hotel and casino in Las Vegas.

descriptions: The Kansas City crime family is allied with the Colorado crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chicago Outfit , Cleveland crime family , Colorado crime family , Los Angeles crime family , Milwaukee crime family , St. Louis crime family

descriptions: St. Louis family listed Colorado crime family as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chicago Outfit , Cleveland crime family , Colorado crime family , Detroit Partnership , Kansas City crime family

descriptions: ISWAP is an official affiliate of IS.
edges.evidence_quote: Islamic State – West Africa Province (ISWAP) is primarily active in the Chad Basin of Niger, Nigeria, Cameroon and Chad. It emerged in 2015 after a split from Boko Haram.

descriptions: IS-GS was formally part of ISWAP from 2019 to 2022.
edges.evidence_quote: From March 2019 to 2022, IS-GS was formally part of the Islamic State – West Africa Province (ISWAP); when it was also called "ISWAP-Greater Sahara".

descriptions: ISWAP split from Boko Haram.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2015 after a split from Boko Haram.
